prompt_text:
### Demographics: 75-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 22 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.3 kg; Height 157.6 cm; BMI 31.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/68 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.0%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 139mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 139mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 77.9kg; 9 months ago 77.1kg; 6 months ago 78.9kg; 3 months ago 77.1kg; current 79.3kg), Height (12 months ago 157.6cm; 9 months ago 157.6cm; 6 months ago 157.6cm; 3 months ago 157.6cm; current 157.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 68mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 68mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 72U/L; 9 months ago 68U/L; 6 months ago 62U/L; 3 months ago 51U/L; current 69U/L), AST (12 months ago 51U/L; 9 months ago 41U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 47U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; current 33mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 183mg/g; 9 months ago 178mg/g; 6 months ago 117mg/g; 3 months ago 149mg/g; current 124mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 38mg/dL; 3 months ago 40mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 147mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 9.6g/dL; 6 months ago 9.5g/dL; 3 months ago 9.6g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
